description: Classic-style vector-shooter arcade game where a ship blasts apart drifting rocks that split into smaller pieces. Reusable game-loop with collision detection, vector graphics rendering, and audio feedback typical of arcade games.
qualityNotes: Promoted from candidate 7a2838be-8cb1-476c-b810-c039f306d244 (trigger=publishToCommunity, weight=2). Vector-shooter arcade pattern.

discriminator.reasoning: Classic vector-shooter arcade pattern. Reusable game-loop with collision detection, vector graphics rendering, audio feedback. Strong candidate for re-skinning into other vector-arcade variants.
